data.name: Hentai Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Girlfriend - 解開不同難度的拼圖。最好的放鬆方式。每位玩家都有 3 種難度模式可選。簡單模式適合想快速完成多個關卡的玩家。中等模式更具挑戰性，需要更多專注力。困難模式適合有經驗的玩家。如果覺得太難，只需按下自動按鈕。遊戲允許你將所有插畫保存到電腦中。通過完成關卡獲得成就——每個關卡都有自己的成就。

遊戲特色

  • 100 張插畫

  • 100 項成就

  • 放鬆的音樂

  • 3 種難度模式

data.short_description: Hentai Girlfriend - 和你的女朋友一起慶祝節日。是度過夜晚的絕佳方式。選擇你喜歡的難度並測試你的專注力。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64-bit Windows 7, 64-bit Windows 8 (8.1) or 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Girlfriend - Solve puzzles of varying difficulty. The best solution for relaxation. There are 3 difficulty modes for each player. Easy is perfect for those who like to quickly complete several levels. Medium is more challenging and requires attention. Hard is for the more experienced players. If things get tough, just press the auto button. The game allows you to save all your artwork to your computer. Earn achievements by completing levels, and each level has its own achievement.

Game Features

  • 100 illustrations

  • 100 achievements

  • Relaxing music

  • 3 difficulty modes

data.short_description: Hentai Girlfriend - Celebrate the holidays with your girlfriend. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.
